allow: Bash(mysql -u hr -p1234 jungle_reserve -e "ALTER TABLE TBL_USER MODIFY COLUMN USER_MAJOR enum\(''composition'',''drum'',''guitar'',''piano'',''saxophone'',''vocal''\) NULL DEFAULT NULL; ALTER TABLE TBL_USER MODIFY COLUMN USER_TYPE enum\(''majorStudent'',''normalStudent''\) NULL DEFAULT NULL;")
Bash(mysql -u hr -p1234 jungle_reserve -e "SELECT id, USER_NAME, USER_PHONE FROM TBL_USER;")
Bash(mysql -u hr -p1234 jungle_reserve -e "SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS=0; DELETE FROM TBL_USER; SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS=1;")
Bash(mysql -u hr -p1234 jungle_reserve -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM TBL_USER;")
